title: Verify the Clone MVP with Emulator, regression, and Playwright evidence
objective: Produce independent Emulator, Vitest, Playwright, accessibility, regression, and residual-risk evidence for the reviewed Clone MVP before conditional Merge eligibility.
acceptanceCriteria: Verify the feature flag is disabled by default and existing behavior has no Clone regression.
Verify CTA placement, owner-only conversion, and complete forbidden-data exclusion.
Verify double-click, multi-tab, retry, and reload recovery behavior.
Verify storage-unavailable, Journal expiry, invalid version, and tampering behavior.
Verify ambiguous Firebase success read-back and myTrips failure and repair behavior against Emulator state.
Verify Built-in Demo immutability and Offline Preview isolation.
Run the approved flow on Desktop Chrome and Mobile Safari Playwright projects.
Record complete Vitest and Playwright results, including conditional skips and all failures.
Record the tested commit, test counts, skips, failures, and remaining risks in the QA report.
Do not use production Firebase or modify Rules, packages, dependencies, migrations, or product source.
